title: Master the Unicode Common Locale Data Repository (CLDR)
description: Implement robust formatting logic for currencies, dates, and relative times using CLDR principles. Avoid relying on bloated client-side libraries for locale-specific formatting across diverse locales.
objectives: Implement robust formatting logic for currencies, dates, and relative times using CLDR principles.
Avoid relying on bloated client-side libraries for locale-specific formatting across diverse locales.
